chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 190 - عن عبد الله بن سنان قال: قلت لأبي عبد الله عليه السلام: عورة المؤمن على المؤمن حرام؟ قال: نعم، قلت: يعني سبيليه؟ فقال: ليس حيث تذهب، إنما هو إذاعة سره.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 190. It has been narrated that 'Abd Allah ibn Sinan said: I said to Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s), 'it is true that believers are forbidden from exposing other believers, is it not?' 'Yes, it is' he replied. 'Does this mean physical nakedness?' I asked. 'No, it is not,' he replied, 'rather it refers to disclosing his secrets.'
